input: MiOS package selection lives at usr/share/mios/mios.toml under [packages.<section>].pkgs; usr/share/doc/mios/reference/PACKAGES.md is the human-readable companion.
_comment: POST $MIOS_AI_ENDPOINT/embeddings (LAW 5). The `model` field defaults to the canonical mios.toml [ai].embed_model value (nomic-embed-text, 768-dim, 8192-token context). Set $MIOS_AI_EMBED_MODEL to override. Works against any OpenAI-API-compatible runtime.
